findings.title: huggingface/transformers
findings.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

findings.title: vllm-project/vllm
findings.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

findings.title: deepspeedai/DeepSpeed
findings.description: DeepSpeed is a deep learning optimization library that makes distributed training and inference easy, efficient, and effective.

findings.title: huggingface/pytorch-image-models
findings.description: The largest collection of PyTorch image encoders / backbones. Including train, eval, inference, export scripts, and pretrained weights -- ResNet, ResNeXT, EfficientNet, NFNet, Vision Transformer (ViT), MobileNetV4, MobileNet-V3 & V2, RegNet, DPN, CSPNet, Swin Transformer, MaxViT, CoAtNet, ConvNeXt, and more

findings.title: Tencent/ncnn
findings.description: ncnn is a high-performance neural network inference framework optimized for the mobile platform

findings.title: microsoft/onnxruntime
findings.description: ONNX Runtime: cross-platform, high performance ML inferencing and training accelerator

findings.title: meta-llama/llama-cookbook
findings.description: Welcome to the Llama Cookbook! This is your go to guide for Building with Llama: Getting started with Inference, Fine-Tuning, RAG. We also show you how to solve end to end problems using Llama model family and using them on various provider services

findings.title: stas00/ml-engineering
findings.description: Machine Learning Engineering Open Book

findings.title: NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM
findings.description: TensorRT LLM provides users with an easy-to-use Python API to define Large Language Models (LLMs) and supports state-of-the-art optimizations to perform inference efficiently on NVIDIA GPUs. TensorRT LLM also contains components to create Python and C++ runtimes that orchestrate the inference execution in a performant way.

findings.title: GeeeekExplorer/nano-vllm
findings.description: Nano vLLM

findings.title: huggingface/text-generation-inference
findings.description: Large Language Model Text Generation Inference

findings.title: bigscience-workshop/petals
findings.description: 🌸 Run LLMs at home, BitTorrent-style. Fine-tuning and inference up to 10x faster than offloading

findings.title: xorbitsai/inference
findings.description: Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API.

findings.title: intel/ipex-llm
findings.description: Accelerate local LLM inference and finetuning (LLaMA, Mistral, ChatGLM, Qwen, DeepSeek, Mixtral, Gemma, Phi, MiniCPM, Qwen-VL, MiniCPM-V, etc.) on Intel XPU (e.g., local PC with iGPU and NPU, discrete GPU such as Arc, Flex and Max); seamlessly integrate with llama.cpp, Ollama, HuggingFace, LangChain, LlamaIndex, vLLM, DeepSpeed, Axolotl, etc.

findings.title: OptimalScale/LMFlow
findings.description: An Extensible Toolkit for Finetuning and Inference of Large Foundation Models. Large Models for All.

findings.title: LMCache/LMCache
findings.description: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

findings.title: NVIDIA/DALI
findings.description: A GPU-accelerated library containing highly optimized building blocks and an execution engine for data processing to accelerate deep learning training and inference applications.

findings.title: NVIDIA/tacotron2
findings.description: Tacotron 2 - PyTorch implementation with faster-than-realtime inference

findings.title: kserve/kserve
findings.description: Standardized Distributed Generative and Predictive AI Inference Platform for Scalable, Multi-Framework Deployment on Kubernetes

findings.title: superduper-io/superduper
findings.description: Superduper: End-to-end framework for building custom AI applications and agents.
